title: Dogs Reflective Rope Lead - 120cm with heavy duty carabiner clip, Rope Lead, 1.2 Meter Leash, Comfortable Handle, Highly Reflective, for Puppy, Small and Medium Dogs. COLOUR (GREEN/GREY)
features: {REFLECTIVE LEAD} Make sure your dog is seen at all hours with our reflective rope dog lead. This is the perfect for all dog walkers making sure you stay safe and seen, day or night.
{DURABLE & WEATHER PROOF} Our dog rope lead is made of a strong, weather-resistant rope for added durability and longevity. Our dog lead rope is designed to be robust and comfortable on long walks.
{SIMPLE ATTACHMENT} Our strong dog lead simply attaches to a collar or harness with a heavy duty black carabiner clip, which locks in for full security no matter how hard your dog pulls.
{MULTIPLE COLOURS} No matter which colour reflective dog lead you choose all it takes is the glimmer of streetlights or the flash of headlights to make you both stand out and dazzle in the dark.

{SUITABILITY} Suitable for Small or Medium Dog Breeds. Our strong dog leads come in sizes 107 x 1.2 cm (Max: 50kg) The reflective stitching ensures you and your dog are visible in the darkest of areas
description: Product Description Visibility and Safety The reflective material improves visibility in low-light conditions, making both the dog and its owner more noticeable to others, such as drivers or cyclists. This is crucial for night time or early-morning walks. Optimal Control At 120 cm, the leash is short enough to provide good control over the dog’s movements, which is essential in crowded areas or when walking near traffic. It's a comfortable length for maintaining close supervision while still giving the dog some freedom. The 120cm length suits dogs of different sizes, making it a versatile choice for pet owners. It's particularly useful for small to medium breeds Training Benefits : It’s an ideal length for teaching leash manners, as it allows the owner to guide the dog without too much slack, reinforcing good behavior during walks. Convenience : The moderate length makes it easier to handle and prevents tangling, which can be a common issue with longer leads. Overall, a 120 cm reflective lead is a smart choice for ensuring both safety and practicality during walks.
